title: Smoked Slovakian Pork Belly Skewers
description: A traditional Slovakian dish featuring charred pork belly slices, served with a sweet and tangy glaze, this recipe is perfect for a solo dinner, mortar-pestle-pound method used for satvik-friendly preparation.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together smoked paprika, brown sugar, apple cider vinegar, olive oil, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced pork belly to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated pork belly slices onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 20 minutes, or until the pork is charred and cooked through.
Meanwhile, prepare the glaze by pounding the marinade ingredients together in a mortar and pestle until well combined.
Brush the glaze over the pork belly skewers during the last 5 minutes of cooking.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
